item.title:
The new X API CLI skill is now in Hermes Agent as well!
Check out the PR below or just run `/xurl &...
item.description:
The new X API CLI skill is now in Hermes Agent as well!
Check out the PR below or just run `/xurl &lt;prompt&gt;` to perform actions and read/search tweets on Twitter
(note: this replaces the xitter skill and requires updating hermes agent!)
https://t.co/ZB8h5Y8Bcj
--- @Teknium | ❤️ 116 | 🔁 13 | 💬 16 | 👁 9616
item.author: @Teknium

item.title:

以防你不知道，以下是开启方...
item.description:
RT @qi9098: 新版的Codex Desktop APP已经原生支持通过 SSH 连接到远程开发环境了
特别适合你的工作依赖于不在你的笔记本电脑上的环境的情况。
以防你不知道，以下是开启方法： 把这一串 [features] remote_connections…
--- @dotey | ❤️ 0 | 🔁 64 | 💬 0 | 👁 0
item.author: @dotey

item.title: RT @devahaz: One of the worst communication gaps is between people who care about precision in langu...
item.author: @swyx

item.title: What string theory has shown me was that it's possible to have an extremely high IQ AND be a complet...
item.description:
What string theory has shown me was that it's possible to have an extremely high IQ AND be a complete idiot.
That inisght has served me really well in my tech career.
--- @tunguz | ❤️ 37 | 🔁 2 | 💬 5 | 👁 1732
item.author: @tunguz
